hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'rm -rf|rm -fr'; then echo 'BLOCKED: rm -rf not allowed' >&2 && exit 2; fi

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then python3 -m ruff check --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

hooks.prompt: BEFORE STOPPING: (1) Was /validate run? Check .validation_passed exists. (2) All task items finished — not just the easy ones? (3) Evidence for every 'works' or 'fixed' claim? (4) Docs updated for any new gotchas found? If ANY is NO — address it, don't stop yet.
